videos.headline: Mainz thrash Cologne to go third
videos.title: Mainz thrash Cologne to go third
videos.caption: A brilliant Mainz performance against 10-man Cologne sees them to a 5-0 win.
videos.description: A brilliant Mainz performance against 10-man Cologne sees them to a 5-0 win.

videos.headline: Luca Kilian sent off for Cologne after second booking
videos.title: Luca Kilian sent off for Cologne after second booking
videos.caption: Cologne will have to play with ten men for over an hour after Luca Kilian is given his marching orders for collecting his second booking.
videos.description: Luca Kilian receives a red vs. Mainz
